message:
fix(mdx): fall back to description frontmatter field when excerpt is missing

- Extract getSummaryExcerpt() helper that checks for an 'excerpt' string
  first, then falls back to 'description', and finally returns an empty
  string -- many blog posts use 'description' instead of 'excerpt' in their
  frontmatter, which previously resulted in blank summaries
- Apply the helper in both getPostBySlug() and getAllPostsMeta() so listing
  pages and individual post pages behave consistently

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
